caption: Caption
chat_id_where_message_was_sent: Chat ID where message was sent
complete_message_result_object_from_tele: Complete message result object from Telegram API
date_the_message_was_sent_unix_timestamp: Date the message was sent (Unix timestamp)
document_file_to_send_pdf_zip_doc_etc: Document file to send (PDF, ZIP, DOC, etc.). Max size: 50MB
enter_the_message_id_to_delete: Enter the message ID to delete
getting_bot_token_1_if_you_haven_t:
Getting Bot Token:
1. If you haven't already, message "/newbot" to @BotFather
2. Choose a name for your bot
3. Copy the token it provides and paste it here
integrate_telegram_into_the_workflow_can: Integrate Telegram into the workflow. Can send and delete messages. Can be used in trigger mode to trigger a workflow when a message is sent to a chat.
post_a_formatted_alert_or_notification_t: Post a formatted alert or notification to a Telegram chat or channel.
reference_a_document_file_from_a_previou: Reference a document file from a previous block
reference_animation_from_previous_blocks: Reference animation from previous blocks or enter URL/file_id
reference_audio_from_previous_blocks_or_: Reference audio from previous blocks or enter URL/file_id
reference_photo_from_previous_blocks_or_: Reference photo from previous blocks or enter URL/file_id
reference_video_from_previous_blocks_or_: Reference video from previous blocks or enter URL/file_id
send_a_photo_video_document_or_audio_fil: Send a photo, video, document, or audio file to a Telegram chat with a caption.
special_entities_in_the_message_mentions: Special entities in the message (mentions, hashtags, etc.)
the_unique_identifier_of_the_message_you: The unique identifier of the message you want to delete
title_of_the_chat_for_groups_and_channel: Title of the chat (for groups and channels)
trigger_a_workflow_when_a_telegram_messa: Trigger a workflow when a Telegram message arrives and act on its content.
type_of_chat_private_group_supergroup_ch: Type of chat (private, group, supergroup, channel)
user_id_who_sent_the_message: User ID who sent the message
whether_the_message_was_successfully_del: Whether the message was successfully deleted
